If you haven’t already, check out our [contributing guidelines](https://github.com/Expensify/ReactNativeChat/blob/main/contributingGuides/CONTRIBUTING.md) for onboarding and email contributors@expensify.com to request to join our Slack channel! ___ **Version Number:** v9.3.54-0 **Reproducible in staging?:** Yes **Reproducible in production?:** Yes **If this was caught during regression testing, add the test name, ID and link from BrowserStack:** https://github.com/Expensify/App/pull/87135 **Email or phone of affected tester (no customers):** kiatest.80+ck47261@gmail.com **Issue reported by:** Applause Internal Team **Bug source:** Pull Request QA execution **Device used:** Windows 11/Chrome **App Component:** Money Requests ## Action Performed: 1. On tab 1 - Navigate to staging.new.expensify.com 2. Sign in to an account user A with USD currency without any policy and bank account 3. On incognito mode - From another account user B, request money to the account user A with USD currency in USD 4. Go back to user A account tab 1 5. Go offline 6. Press the Pay button > Pay with business bank account 7. Observe Not here page displayed in background ## Expected Result: Workspace should be created in background which to be displayed in grayed out status (in 50% opacity) ## Actual Result: Not here page opens in background on selecting Pay with Business BA in offline mode ## Workaround: Unknown ## Platforms: - [ ] Android: App - [ ] Android: mWeb Chrome - [ ] iOS: App - [ ] iOS: mWeb Safari - [ ] iOS: mWeb Chrome - [x] Windows: Chrome - [ ] MacOS: Chrome / Safari ## Screenshots/Videos https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/440d2d9f-4971-48d4-9a65-ed7d05de269b [View all open jobs on GitHub](https://github.com/Expensify/App/issues?q=is%3Aopen+is%3Aissue+label%3A%22Help+Wanted%22)
